meaning: n.[心]构造主义者,[语]结构语言学家adj.构造主义的,结构主义的
examples: There are two main structuralist techniques incorporated into critical social research.
Structuralist poetics has formed the theoretical background of literary competence.
Yes, I can say it's a structuralist idea, but I really believe it because I've seen it in operation.
TVed professor of black studies, alerted the world to the latter's recent work, which turns out to be a mixture of post-structuralist mumbo jumbo, religious rhetoric and rap music.
